headline: Clark Howard Says Congress Passed a Law That Specifically Punished People for Giving Money to Charity
summary: A listener named Chris from California put the problem plainly: “We donate about $5,000 every year and plan to continue doing so, but receive no tax benefit.” His family gives generously, gets nothing from the IRS for it, and wanted to know if there was a legal fix. There is, and it works better than ... Clark Howard Says Congress Passed a Law That Specifically Punished People for Giving Money to Charity
